title: Result-first Mini App session UI
acceptanceCriteria: Mini App session and project views emphasize result, next action, and task or question entry before technical metadata.
Long paths, raw payloads, event JSON, and verbose operational details are hidden behind progressive disclosure or removed from the primary scan path.
The new-task form supports implementation tasks and implementation questions without changing backend architecture contracts.
Codex Desktop and Codex CLI source-aware flows remain intact, including Desktop continuation and disabled unsupported actions.
Existing auth, base-path link prefixing, and no-raw-secret rendering behavior remain covered by tests.
Validation evidence is recorded under the task bundle.
